__comment_overview: claude-code-starter -- settings.json. Defines hooks, permissions, and environment for Claude Code CLI.

hooks.__comment_hooks: Three lite hooks handle session lifecycle. Place hook scripts in .claude/hooks/

UserPromptSubmit.__comment: Injects [SESSION] short_id and session_id at conversation start. Outputs session identifiers that CLAUDE.md references for MCP tool calls and temp folder paths.

PostToolUse.__comment: Unified logging for all tool invocations. Logs tool name, parameters, duration, and result status. Useful for debugging agent behavior and auditing cost.
Fires after any tool use, including the Skill tool. Use this to update dashboards, release queue items, or trigger follow-up workflows.

permissions.__comment_permissions: Allowlists control which tools Claude can use without prompting. Add tool names exactly as they appear in the tool list. Wildcards are not supported.
permissions.__comment_deny: Add patterns here to block specific tools or commands. Example: Bash(rm -rf*) to prevent recursive deletes.

env.__comment_env: Environment variables available to hooks and scripts. Override via .env file or shell environment.

__comment_git: Disabling built-in git instructions prevents Claude from generating its own commit/PR patterns. All git writes go through the /code-checkin skill defined in CLAUDE.md.
